title: I2: Domain and persistence runtime
description: Implement core domain entities, persistence mappings, repositories, and local seed data for the backend MVP.

title: I2.1: Implement base persistence scaffolding
description: Add base entity/audit support, UUID identity strategy, shared JPA mappings, and persistence package structure.

title: I2.2: Implement User and role persistence
description: Add User and role persistence, unique login identity constraints, hashed password storage, and refresh-token persistence support.

title: I2.3: Implement Restaurant, Menu, and Ingredient persistence
description: Add first-class Restaurant plus Menu and Ingredient persistence, ownership relationships, location fields, and visibility state.

title: I2.4: Implement Order, OrderItem, and OrderStatus persistence
description: Add order aggregate, line items, status enum, timestamps, and ownership relationships.

title: I2.5: Implement repository interfaces and baseline query methods
description: Add repositories and baseline queries needed by auth, browse, profile, admin, and order flows.

title: I2.6: Implement seed and demo data bootstrap
description: Add deterministic local/test seed data for admin user, restaurants, menus, and sample orders.

title: I8: Testing and delivery runtime

title: I8.1: Implement repository integration tests
description: Verify core persistence mappings and repository queries.

title: I8.2: Implement auth and security tests
description: Verify JWT issuance/validation, route protection, refresh rotation, and logout revocation behavior.

title: I8.3: Implement profile and catalog API integration tests
description: Verify /users/me, /restaurants, /menus, and ingredient-read flows.

title: I8.4: Implement admin and order API integration tests
description: Verify admin CRUD/status flows and order create/read/error/idempotency behavior.

title: I8.5: Implement seed, fixture, and CI verification baseline
description: Finalize deterministic fixtures and CI verification baseline for MVP delivery.

title: I3: JWT auth and security runtime
description: Implement JWT-based authentication, security filter chain, auth endpoints, and admin bootstrap policy.

title: I3.1: Implement auth properties and password encoding
description: Bind JWT/auth properties from configuration and expose password encoder/runtime security properties.

title: I3.2: Implement JWT token service and principal mapping
description: Generate and validate JWTs and map claims to authenticated principal state.

title: I3.3: Implement SecurityFilterChain and bearer auth filter
description: Wire bearer auth, public vs protected routes, and role/ownership-aware security baseline.

title: I3.4: Implement auth endpoints
description: Add /auth/register, /auth/login, /auth/refresh, and /auth/logout with real refresh/logout MVP behavior.

title: I3.5: Implement admin bootstrap and role assignment policy
description: Establish how initial admins exist and how admin role assignment is controlled.

title: I1: Shared runtime and platform baseline
description: Implement shared runtime concerns such as global errors, correlation IDs, health/readiness, and web baseline behavior.

title: I1.1: Implement global API error handling
description: Add a single error envelope and exception mapping aligned with AUTH_*, ORDER_*, validation, and not-found contracts.

title: I1.2: Implement correlation ID propagation and trace alignment
description: Accept and propagate X-Correlation-Id and align one request identifier with error payload traceId and structured logging.

title: I1.3: Implement health and readiness endpoints
description: Add minimal runtime health/readiness behavior appropriate for local, test, and deployed contexts.

title: I1.4: Implement CORS, OpenAPI, and web baseline
description: Add CORS policy, OpenAPI exposure, and minimal web configuration consistent with JWT-secured APIs.

title: I7: Order workflow runtime
description: Implement order creation, retrieval, history, state transitions, admin order operations, idempotency, and tracking projections.

description: Enforce valid order transitions and ownership/admin boundaries.

description: Implement admin operational control of order state changes.

title: I4: Customer account and profile runtime

description: Implement public restaurant/menu browse endpoints including location-aware listing, detail payloads, ingredient reads, images, and availability semantics.

title: I5.3: Implement GET /menus

title: I5.5: Implement GET /menus/{menuId}/ingredients
description: Implement ingredient detail/read projection for menu detail flows.

title: I5.6: Implement restaurant and menu image retrieval strategy
description: Deliver restaurant/menu image payloads or URLs consistently.

title: I5.7: Implement availability semantics in browse responses
description: Surface availability, inactive, and sold-out semantics consistently across list and detail payloads.

title: P0: Reset Beads and align planning docs
description: Rebuild local Beads graph and align planning documentation to the agreed backend execution plan.

title: P0.1: Remove legacy Beads state and initialize clean local tracking
description: Delete stale .beads artifacts, initialize fresh repo-local tracking, and verify issues.jsonl is source-of-truth.

title: P0.2: Audit branch state and tooling prerequisites
description: Confirm develop branch status, available br command path, and local-only execution assumptions before plan seeding.

title: P0.3: Align AGENTS.md to low-context execution reality
description: Update AGENTS.md with accurate repo facts, branch/package rules, verification defaults, and detailed plan mapping.

title: P0.4: Keep DEVELOPMENT.md truthful for single-module-first bootstrap
description: Ensure DEVELOPMENT.md states current single-module bootstrap and delayed module split intent without speculative architecture claims.

title: I0: Implementation decisions and contract freeze
description: Freeze MVP implementation decisions and shared API/runtime contracts before coding begins.

title: I0.1: Freeze JWT auth contract for MVP
description: Finalize access/refresh token strategy, claims, login/register expectations, logout semantics, and principal mapping for backend and client rewrites.

title: I0.2: Promote Restaurant to first-class aggregate
description: Supersede earlier Menu-first planning and freeze Restaurant -> Menu ownership plus admin ownership expectations.

title: I0.3: Freeze canonical endpoint surface and compatibility policy
description: Freeze canonical JWT-era routes such as /auth, /users/me, /restaurants, /menus, and /orders, and explicitly reject legacy sid-based compatibility as required runtime behavior.

title: I0.4: Freeze shared DTO, pagination, and error-envelope rules
description: Standardize response shapes, pagination direction, validation/error envelopes, ISO timestamp rules, and traceId/correlationId alignment.

title: I0.5: Freeze media, location, and payment-profile strategy
description: Freeze image delivery strategy, location-aware browse rules, and payment-profile scope/validation/storage decisions for MVP.
